mapper.select: SELECT c.id as course_id, c.title, c.description, c.cover_image_url, c.enrollment_count, c.teacher_id, cp.price, cp.original_price, cp.level, cp.is_new, cp.target_audience, cp.requirements, u.id as instructor_id, u.nickname as instructor_name, u.avatar_url as instructor_avatar, ci.title as instructor_title, ci.biography as instructor_biography FROM courses c LEFT JOIN course_properties cp ON c.id = cp.course_id LEFT JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course_instructor ci ON u.id = ci.teacher_id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = 'published'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.duration_seconds), 0) as totalDurationSeconds FROM chapters ch JOIN sections s ON ch.id = s.chapter_id WHERE ch.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT c.id as courseId, c.title as courseTitle, c.description as courseDescription, c.cover_image_url as courseCover, c.status as courseStatus, c.created_at as createTime, c.updated_at as updateTime, cc.name as categoryName, c.teacher_id as teacherId, u.nickname as teacherName, cc.id as categoryId FROM courses c LEFT JOIN course_categories cc ON c.category_id = cc.id LEFT JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = 'published' ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) as courseCount FROM courses WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'published'
